pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Spring Boot parent version to a release compatible with Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.4.x does not support Java 17; upgrading to 2.6.x is required to compile and run on JDK 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property to 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must target JDK 17 to utilize its features and ensure compatibility with the new Spring Boot version.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Set the Spring MVC path matching strategy to ANT_PATH_MATCHER to resolve deprecation warnings and ensure compatibility with Spring Boot 3.x / Spring Framework 6.x which removed the default AntPathMatcher in favor of PathPatternParser.
src/main/resources/application.propertie.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x (required for Java 17+ in modern stacks) defaults to PathPatternParser; without explicitly setting ANT_PATH_MATCHER, applications relying on Ant-style path matching (common in older Spring Security or Swagger configurations) may fail to match routes or throw errors during startup.
